evidence_gate.rule: Count value only if public listing, reply, lead, payment, or usable value is later verified.

immediate_purchase_path.required_first_step: Email one public URL or public workflow/problem description for scope confirmation; do not send passwords, API keys, private customer data, payment data, KYC/tax files, or screenshots with secrets.
immediate_purchase_path.value_count_rule: Only count paid_or_usable_value after payment or other usable value is received and verified.
